title: eunomia caespitosa
intro: Eunomia caespitosa, also known as the rough dandelion, is a flowering plant species in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It is often used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Eunomia caespitosa include its ability to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and act as a natural diuretic. Eunomia caespitosa is typically prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used topically to soothe skin irritations and wounds.
